title: Swift's Epitaph
content:
Swift has sailed into his rest;
Savage indignation there
Cannot lacerate his breast.
Imitate him if you dare,
World-besotted traveller; he
Served human liberty.
meaning:
William Butler Yeats's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Swift's Epitaph"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
